description_long: This is a Bosch PSR 12 electric drill, featuring a robust plastic body with a teal and pink color scheme. The drill has an ergonomic handle with a textured grip for comfortable use, and a visible trigger button located just above the grip. The front section houses a keyless chuck, currently without a drill bit attached, and the battery pack is integrated at the base, colored in pink. Ventilation slots are present on the side of the main body to prevent overheating during operation. The overall design is compact and suitable for handheld use in various urban and workshop environments.
description: A Bosch PSR 12 electric drill with a teal and pink plastic body, ergonomic grip, and visible battery pack. The drill features a keyless chuck and side ventilation slots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular keyless chuck opening and the top of the handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the Bosch logo, trigger button, grip texture, and ventilation slots.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle and battery pack, with minimal detail on the chuck.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the grip, trigger button, and the drill's overall profile.
